headline: CVRx Stock Up on Humana's Medicare Coverage for Barostim Therapy
summary: CVRX stock gains after Humana adds Medicare Advantage coverage for Barostim therapy, boosting reimbursement momentum and patient access.

headline: NTRA's Signatera CDx Wins FDA Nod in Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer
summary: Natera wins FDA approval for Signatera CDx in bladder cancer, marking the first blood-based MRD companion diagnostic milestone.
